assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map 'Flagged Ambiguities' section lists 5 ambiguities: (1) No performance baseline or target, (2) No definition of relevance, (3) No filter specification, (4) No search scope definition, (5) No data volume context. This exceeds the minimum of 3.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map Scope section: 'The "Better UI" requirement is explicitly excluded — it is marked non-MVP and cannot be planned without design mockups or a frontend repository in the Repository Registry.' Also in Excluded from Scope table: 'Better UI | Non-MVP. No design mockups provided. No frontend repository in the Repository Registry. Cannot be planned.' Also in summary-comment.md: 'Better UI (non-MVP): Cannot be planned without design mockups or a frontend repository.'

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All three tasks (task-1-search-indexes.md, task-2-relevance-ranking.md, task-3-search-filters.md) follow the template with sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify/Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, Dependencies. Optional sections are omitted per template rules (e.g., task-1 has no API Changes since it is a migration-only task).

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Description: 'Assumption (pending clarification): No performance baseline or target SLA has been provided.' Task 2 Description has two assumptions: 'Assumption (pending clarification): No definition of "relevance" has been provided' and 'Assumption (pending clarification): The relevance score will be included as a numeric field...' Task 3 Description: 'Assumption (pending clarification): The feature description specifies "some kind of filtering capability" without defining which fields, operators, or combination logic.' Impact map lists ASSUMPTION-1 through ASSUMPTION-5 in an 'Assumptions (Pending Clarification)' section.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence:
Task 1 line 1-2: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 2 line 1-2: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 3 line 1-2: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Each has exactly one repository name.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 27), '## Test Requirements' (line 34). Task 2: '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 34), '## Test Requirements' (line 42). Task 3: '## Target Branch' (line 4), '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 33), '## Test Requirements' (line 44). All four required sections present in every task.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in repo-backend.md: migration/src/lib.rs (line 20), modules/search/src/service/mod.rs (line 91), modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs (line 93), common/src/db/query.rs (line 28). Files to Create paths follow existing directory patterns: migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs follows the m0001_initial/mod.rs pattern (line 21), modules/search/src/model/*.rs follows the model/ pattern from sibling modules (e.g., modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/).

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/sbom.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, entity/src/package.rs, SeaORM's manager.get_connection().execute_unprepared(). Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs, PaginatedResults<SearchResult>, common/src/error.rs, modules/search/src/lib.rs. Task 3 references: common/src/db/query.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (AdvisorySummary severity field), modules/fundamental/src/package/model/summary.rs (PackageSummary license field), common/src/error.rs, modules/search/src/model/mod.rs.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence:
Task 1 lines 4-5: '## Target Branch
main'. Task 2 lines 4-5: '## Target Branch
main'. Task 3 lines 4-5: '## Target Branch
main'.

assertion_results.text: For each task created, a description digest is produced — evidenced by a separate digest file (e.g., task-N-digest.md), a digest entry in the impact map, or a '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' marker in any output file. The digest must contain a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string
assertion_results.evidence: task-1-digest.md: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:9fcf50f87c48e8096f22d1edc99bef77ff6e959e43b5a5182d39fbc3b9d1caa8' (64 hex chars). task-2-digest.md: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:1c7adf85ae2417a41f291dafa84f14b6096cfe9b80a0dbc2bb3056652387c4d4' (64 hex chars). task-3-digest.md: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:eac3842b89423500334fdc57891b74366f0bbca3c0bac338769a15ec60b4f2eb' (64 hex chars). Also corroborated in description-digest-comment.md with matching values.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All convention rationales follow the prescribed format. Task 1: 'Applies: task creates migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs matching the convention's migration module scope.' Task 2: 'Applies: task creates modules/search/src/model/search_result.rs matching the convention's model module scope.' and 'Applies: task modifies modules/search/src/service/mod.rs matching the convention's service module scope.' and 'Applies: task modifies modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's endpoint scope.' Task 3: 'Applies: task modifies common/src/db/query.rs matching the convention's shared query helper scope.' and 'Applies: task modifies modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's endpoint scope.' No inapplicable conventions are listed with 'Not applicable' annotations anywhere in the output.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), the plan documents that the Feature's priority is inherited by created tasks — evidenced by priority field values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the plan documents that priority inheritance is skipped (not propagated as null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map line 6: 'Priority: Normal (inherited by all tasks)'. Impact map Field Inheritance table: 'Priority | Normal | Inherited by all tasks (parent Feature priority is not "Undefined")'. Summary-comment.md Field Inheritance table: 'Priority | Normal | Inherited — parent Feature priority is set and not "Undefined" (constraint 1.74)'. Impact map additional_fields JSON: '"priority": { "name": "Normal" }'.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), the plan documents that fixVersions are inherited by created tasks — evidenced by fixVersion values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the plan documents that fixVersion inheritance is skipped
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map line 7: 'Fix Versions: RHTPA 1.6.0 (inherited by all tasks — no fixVersion scope config, defaults to "both")'. Impact map Field Inheritance table: 'Fix Versions | RHTPA 1.6.0 | Inherited by all tasks (no fixVersion scope configured — defaults to "both")'. Summary-comment.md: 'Fix Versions | RHTPA 1.6.0 | Inherited — no fixVersion scope configured, defaults to "both" (constraint 1.75)'. Impact map additional_fields JSON: '"fixVersions": [{ "name": "RHTPA 1.6.0" }]'.

assertion_results.text: A summary of inherited field propagation is produced — evidenced by a summary-comment.md file in the outputs directory, or a summary section in the impact map that includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: summary-comment.md exists and contains a 'Field Inheritance' section (lines 20-26) with: Priority=Normal (inherited), Fix Versions=RHTPA 1.6.0 (inherited), Labels=ai-generated-jira. The impact map also contains a 'Field Inheritance' section (lines 79-85) with the same information.

assertion_results.text: No documentation task is generated because the feature description does not contain a Documentation Considerations section
assertion_results.evidence: Only three tasks exist: task-1-search-indexes.md, task-2-relevance-ranking.md, task-3-search-filters.md. None are documentation tasks. summary-comment.md lines 57-58 explicitly states: 'Documentation Task: Not generated — the feature description does not contain a Documentation Considerations section (constraint 1.84).'

assertion_results.text: No testing tasks are generated because no testing readiness template is present in the eval fixture files
assertion_results.evidence: Only three tasks exist: task-1-search-indexes.md (search indexes), task-2-relevance-ranking.md (relevance ranking), task-3-search-filters.md (search filters). None are standalone testing tasks. summary-comment.md lines 60-61 explicitly states: 'Testing Tasks: Not generated — no testing readiness template exists at docs/testing-readiness.md in the target repository (constraint 1.86).'
